baseUrl.description: Jira Cloud base URL, e.g. https://your-domain.atlassian.net

projectKey.description: Jira project key to listen on, e.g. ENG

stopOnAssigneeAccountId.description: Account ID of the user to stop on. Provide either this or stopOnAssigneeEmail.

stopOnAssigneeEmail.description: Email of the user to stop on (will be resolved to accountId if possible). Provide either this or stopOnAssigneeAccountId.

includeFields.description: List of field IDs to include in the output. If omitted, a sensible default set is used.

expandChangelog.description: If true, expands changelog in search to detect assignee changes precisely.

maxDurationSeconds.description: Maximum listening duration in seconds before timing out.

pageSize.description: Number of issues to fetch per page (1-100).

jqlFilter.description: Additional JQL to AND with the project filter, e.g. status != Done.
